scope_notes: Direct communication energy (TX chain, baseband proxy)
BS infrastructure overhead (cooling + PSU losses; factor ~1.50 on energy)

stats.co2_scope_statement:
CO2 Emissions Scope:
INCLUDED:
  - Direct communication energy (TX/RX circuits, baseband processing)
  - Power amplifier energy consumption
  - BS infrastructure overhead (cooling, PSU losses, PUE-style factor)

EXCLUDED (out of scope):
  - Vehicle propulsion energy for transportation
  - Manufacturing emissions of vehicles and OBUs
  - Network backbone / transport network energy
  - End-user smartphone/tablet energy (non-OBU)
